cards.correct_latex: f_{\mathrm{ob}} = f_{\mathrm{źr}} \dfrac{v_d \mp v_{\mathrm{ob}}}{v_d \pm v_{\mathrm{źr}}}\,,\quad f_{\mathrm{ob}} = f_{\mathrm{źr}} \sqrt{\dfrac{c \mp v_{\mathrm{źr}}}{c \pm v_{\mathrm{źr}}}}
distractors: f_{\mathrm{ob}} = f_{\mathrm{źr}} \dfrac{v_d \pm v_{\mathrm{źr}}}{v_d \mp v_{\mathrm{ob}}}\,,\quad f_{\mathrm{ob}} = f_{\mathrm{źr}} \sqrt{\dfrac{c \mp v_{\mathrm{źr}}}{c \pm v_{\mathrm{źr}}}}
f_{\mathrm{ob}} = f_{\mathrm{źr}} v_d \mp v_{\mathrm{ob}}\,v_d \pm v_{\mathrm{źr}}\,,\quad f_{\mathrm{ob}} = f_{\mathrm{źr}} \sqrt{\dfrac{c \mp v_{\mathrm{źr}}}{c \pm v_{\mathrm{źr}}}}
f_{\mathrm{ob}} = f_{\mathrm{źr}} \tfrac{v_d \mp v_{\mathrm{ob}}}{v_d \pm v_{\mathrm{źr}}}\,,\quad f_{\mathrm{ob}} = f_{\mathrm{źr}} \sqrt{\dfrac{c \mp v_{\mathrm{źr}}}{c \pm v_{\mathrm{źr}}}}

\dfrac{1}{x} + \dfrac{1}{y} = 1\,f\quad (x>0,\ y \gtrless 0,\ f \gtrless 0\ \text{— znaki wg typu obrazu i optyki})
\dfrac{1}{x} + \dfrac{1}{y} = \tfrac{1}{f}\quad (x>0,\ y \gtrless 0,\ f \gtrless 0\ \text{— znaki wg typu obrazu i optyki})

R(T) = R(T_0)\bigl(1 - \alpha \Delta T\bigr)\,,\quad \Delta T = T - T_0
R(T) = R(T_0)\bigl(1 + \alpha \Delta T\bigr)\,,\quad \Delta T = T + T_0

cards.correct_latex: E = \dfrac{m c^2}{\sqrt{1 - v^2/c^2}}\,,\quad v = \dfrac{\Delta x}{\Delta t}
distractors: E = \dfrac{\sqrt{1 - v^2/c^2}}{m c^2}\,,\quad v = \dfrac{\Delta x}{\Delta t}
E = m c^2\,\sqrt{1 - v^2/c^2}\,,\quad v = \dfrac{\Delta x}{\Delta t}
E = \dfrac{m c^2}{\sqrt{1 - v^2\cdotc^2}}\,,\quad v = \dfrac{\Delta x}{\Delta t}

p = \dfrac{m v}{\sqrt{1 - v^2\cdotc^2}}\,,\quad v = \dfrac{\Delta x}{\Delta t}
